summary: Ukrainian forces reported multiple Shahed drone attacks targeting locations in the south and east, including Odessa, Odesa region, and Crimea oil facilities. Russian forces continued offensive actions on the Krasnoliman front, advancing toward the village of Stary Karavan. Drone activity and strikes on logistics and energy infrastructure remained intense across multiple fronts.
key_points: Ukrainian Shahed drones attacked Odessa region, hitting a non‑residential building and causing civilian injury (Source: @UkraineNow/81745).
Russian troops advanced on the Krasnoliman front, fighting for the village of Stary Karavan (Source: @tass_agency/379621).
Ukrainian special‑operations units struck the "Semikolo­dezyanska" oil depot and a terminal in occupied Crimea (Source: @UkraineNow/81749).
Multiple Shahed drones were reported near Chornomorsk/Limanok and over the Black Sea (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67515).
Ukrainian drones targeted energy and transport infrastructure in Luhansk region, including an electric substation near Rodakove (Source: @eRadarrua/95811).
Russian attacks on two Sea Search and Rescue vessels in the Ukrainian maritime corridor resulted in casualties (Source: @UkraineNow/81741).
Ukrainian UAVs were observed over Dnipropetrovsk heading toward Shakhtarske and Pavlohrad (Source: @kpszsu/64296).
Ukrainian drone activity was reported over the Black Sea heading toward Chornomorsk and Pivdenne (Source: @kpszsu/64348).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian Shahed drone attacks struck civilian and energy targets in Odessa and Crimea, while Russian forces pushed forward on the Krasnoliman front toward Stary Karavan. Drone activity intensified across the Black Sea and eastern regions, targeting logistics, energy, and transport infrastructure. Both sides continue high‑intensity operations with notable strikes on maritime rescue vessels and oil facilities.

points: Ukrainian Shahed drones hit a non‑residential building in Odesa, injuring a 41‑year‑old man and damaging residential structures, a gas pipe, and two cargo trucks in Chornomorsk (Source: @UkraineNow/81745).
Special‑operations units of Middle‑strike struck the "Semikolo­dezyanska" oil depot and a terminal in occupied Crimea, damaging Russian‑controlled fuel infrastructure (Source: @UkraineNow/81749).

Ukrainian drones attacked energy and transport assets in Luhansk, including an electric substation near Rodakove, railway infrastructure, a fuel depot, and drone‑operator command posts (Source: @eRadarrua/95811).
Ukrainian UAVs were reported over Dnipropetrovsk heading toward Shakhtarske and Pavlohrad, indicating continued reconnaissance or strike missions in the region (Source: @kpszsu/64296).
Multiple Shahed drones were observed near Chornomorsk/Limanok and over the Black Sea, suggesting coordinated attacks on southern coastal targets (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67515).
Russian forces advanced on the Krasnoliman front, engaging in battles for the village of Stary Karavan and clearing Ukrainian fighters along the road (Source: @tass_agency/379621).
Russian attacks on two Sea Search and Rescue vessels in the Ukrainian maritime corridor caused casualties and prompted evacuation by Ukrainian naval forces (Source: @UkraineNow/81741).
Russian forces continued systematic attacks on the Kharkiv‑Sumy logistics corridor, as noted in broader reports of intensified UAV strikes on Russian rear areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30735).
Russian air defenses reported intercepts of Shahed drones over the Black Sea, though specific outcomes were not detailed (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67512).
Ukrainian UAVs were observed over the Black Sea heading toward Chormorske/Pivdenne, indicating pressure on southern eastern maritime routes (Source: @kpszsu/64348).
Ukrainian drones targeted logistics along the "Novorossiya" highway, affecting fuel and supply lines in the east (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30735).
Ukrainian reconnaissance UAVs reported over Zaporizhzhia from the south and from Kherson toward Kryvyi Rih, showing activity across the eastern axis (Source: @kpszsu/64325).
Ukrainian forces reported strikes on Odessa, Zaporizhzhia, Kryvyi Rih, Dnipro, Kharkiv, and Poltava, reflecting broad eastern operational reach (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30735).
Ukrainian UAVs were reported over northern Chernihiv heading toward Koryukivka, indicating reconnaissance or strike activity in the north (Source: @kpszsu/64298).
Ukrainian drones were observed over northern Chernihiv heading toward the hills, suggesting continued pressure on northern positions (Source: @kpszsu/64325).
Ukrainian forces advanced near Kazacha Lopan and achieved up to 700 m gains in Sumy region settlements, as part of the northern front operations (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30735).
Ukrainian UAV activity was reported over the Black Sea heading toward Chornomorsk and Limanok, affecting northern Black Sea approaches (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67515).
Ukrainian Shahed drones attacked Odesa region infrastructure, igniting a non‑residential building and damaging civilian structures and a gas pipeline (Source: @UkraineNow/81745).
Ukrainian UAVs from the Black Sea were reported heading toward Tatarnbary in Odesa, indicating southern maritime targeting (Source: @kpszsu/64353).
Ukrainian drones from the Black Sea headed toward Chornomorsk and Karolino‑Buhaz, showing pressure on southern coastal settlements (Source: @kpszsu/64326).
Ukrainian forces reported strikes on oil depots and terminals in occupied Crimea, affecting southern strategic assets (Source: @UkraineNow/81749).
Multiple Shahed drones were reported near Chornomorsk/Limanok and over the Black Sea, highlighting ongoing aerial threats to southern ports (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67515).
Ukrainian UAV strikes targeted energy infrastructure across Luhansk, including an electric substation and fuel depot, demonstrating air‑to‑ground capabilities (Source: @eRadarrua/95811).
Russian forces reported engagements with Ukrainian UAVs over the Krasnoliman front, though specific interception data were not provided (Source: @tass_agency/379621).
Ukrainian UAV activity was observed over the Black Sea heading toward Chormorske/Pivdenne, indicating continued air operations over maritime zones (Source: @kpszsu/64348).

key_developments: Ukrainian Shahed drones struck a non‑residential building in Odesa, injuring a civilian and damaging nearby structures and a gas pipe (Source: @UkraineNow/81745).
Russian troops advanced on the Krasnoliman front, fighting for the village of Stary Karavan and clearing Ukrainian fighters along the road (Source: @tass_agency/379621).
Ukrainian special‑operations units hit the "Semikolo­dezyanska" oil depot and a terminal in occupied Crimea, damaging Russian‑controlled fuel infrastructure (Source: @UkraineNow/81749).
Multiple Shahed drones were reported near Chornomorsk/Limanok and over the Black Sea, indicating coordinated southern aerial attacks (Source: @mon1tor_ua/67515).
Ukrainian drones attacked energy and transport infrastructure in Luhansk, including an electric substation near Rodakove and a fuel depot (Source: @eRadarrua/95811).
Russian forces attacked two Sea Search and Rescue vessels in the Ukrainian maritime corridor, causing casualties and prompting evacuation (Source: @UkraineNow/81741).
Ukrainian UAVs were observed over Dnipropetrovsk heading toward Shakhtarske and Pavlohrad, showing continued eastern reconnaissance/strike activity (Source: @kpszsu/64296).
sections.threat_assessment: Ukrainian Shahed drone deployments continue to threaten civilian and energy targets in the south, while Russian ground advances on the Krasnoliman front indicate a renewed push to secure territorial gains. Drone activity across the Black Sea and eastern corridors stresses logistics for both sides, with Ukrainian UAVs targeting fuel depots and rail infrastructure. Russian attacks on maritime rescue vessels highlight a willingness to breach international humanitarian norms, raising the risk of broader escalation in the maritime domain.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian authorities are mobilizing emergency services to address civilian casualties and infrastructure damage in Odesa and Chornomorsk, while reinforcing air defense around key southern ports. Russian command appears to be concentrating forces on the Krasnoliman axis, likely aiming to link up with forces in the Donetsk direction. International observers have condemned attacks on rescue vessels, potentially influencing diplomatic pressure on Russia.
sections.intelligence_notes: Continued monitoring of Shahed drone launch points in the Black Sea is essential to anticipate further southern strikes. The advance toward Stary Karavan suggests Russian intent to secure supply routes along the Krasnoliman corridor. Ukrainian UAV operations over Dnipropetrovsk and Luhansk indicate a focus on disrupting Russian logistics and energy assets. Coordination between Ukrainian special‑operations units and drone assets in Crimea demonstrates integrated strike capabilities that may target additional Russian rear installations.
